Professional Experience

03/2025 – 12/2025

PRECIMOLD

Final-Year Internship

Mechanical Design Engineer — Mold Handling System

  • Study and design of a lifting and handling mechanism for molds in a transfer molding application
  • State-of-the-art analysis of transfer molding presses and existing industrial mold-handling solutions
  • Mechanical sizing and calculations (Strength of Materials) validated through FEA
  • Sizing and selection of pneumatic actuators; design of pneumatic circuits and Ladder logic programming
  • Design of the heating system and thermal optimization of the process
  • Ergonomic validation and workstation optimization (NF EN ISO 14738)

03

Engineering Projects

P.01 — CAPSTONE · PRECIMOLD

Lifting & Handling Mechanism — Transfer Molding

Automated Industrial Safety System

Designed a fully automated mold-handling system at PRECIMOLD to eliminate operator exposure to 180°C mold surfaces. Covers complete mechanical design, FEA validation, pneumatic actuation, Ladder logic control, heating system design, and ergonomic workstation analysis per NF EN ISO 14738.

180°C

Hazard eliminated

4×

Simultaneous parts

3

Imprint stations

0

Burn risk

SolidWorksAbaqusRDM7Automation StudioLadderISO 14738

P.02

FEA Simulation — Mechanical Components

Structural & Thermal Analysis · Abaqus

Finite element analysis on structural frames, springs, heating plates, and rail beams. Computed von Mises stress, axial stress, displacement, and thermal gradients (24°C–227°C) using Abaqus Standard.

AbaqusFEAVon MisesThermal

P.03

Pneumatic Circuit & Ladder Logic

Industrial Automation Design

Designed full pneumatic circuits in Automation Studio and programmed sequential PLC control logic in Ladder, including timer, sensor, and actuator sequencing for the mold handling system.

Automation StudioLadder LogicPLC

P.04

Plastic Injection Mold — Meal Tray

Mold Design & Flow Simulation

Full mold design for a food-service meal tray: parting surface, gate & runner system, cooling channels, ejection mechanism. Plastic flow simulation verified fill time and minimized warpage.

SolidWorksMoldWorksFlow Simulation

P.05 · PRECIMOLD

Injection Mold — School Slates (Over-molding)

Insert Molding · Thermo-mechanical Validation

Over-molding mold for school slates: cavity sizing, runner & cooling system design, shrinkage calculations, thermo-mechanical validation, and full machining process plan preparation.

SolidWorksMastercamOver-moldingFEA

P.06

Plastic Injection Mold — Full Assembly

Complete Mold Design · SolidWorks

Complete injection mold design including cavity/core splits, slider mechanisms, cooling system, ejection plates, and full bill of materials. Draft angle and parting line analysis performed.

SolidWorksCavity/CoreBOM

P.07

Technical Documentation — Assembly & Part Drawings

ISO Standard Technical Drawings

Complete set of assembly drawings (nomenclature, exploded views) and individual part drawings (sections, tolerances, surface finish) produced to ISO 2768 standards for full manufacturing files.

SolidWorksISO 2768GD&TTechnical Documentation

P.08

Reverse Engineering — Industrial Workbench

Measurement · 3D Reconstruction · CAD Modeling

Reverse engineered an industrial workbench with drawer cabinet from physical measurements. Reconstructed full 3D assembly in SolidWorks including structural frame (50×30×2.6 steel tubes), drawer unit, and fastener details — validated against real model dimensions.

SolidWorksReverse EngineeringSheet MetalAssembly

P.09

Clay Shaping Press — CAD & Technical Documentation

Hydraulic Press Design · Die & Punch

Designed a clay shaping press in SolidWorks matched to a real physical machine. Includes die, punch, and hydraulic press frame. Complete technical file produced: assembly drawings, part drawings, BOM, and machining process plans.

SolidWorksDie & PunchTechnical DrawingBOM

P.10

CNC Punch Mold Machining — SolidCAM

CAM Programming · iMachining · G-code

Modeled punch and mold cavity in SolidWorks, then programmed full CNC machining in SolidCAM using iMachining for roughing, semi-finishing, and finishing. Machine simulation verified G-code before production.

SolidCAMiMachiningG-codeCNC

P.11

Heavy-Duty Tire Changer

Industrial Machine Design · Full Prototype

Designed a heavy-duty tire changing machine for trucks and buses. Hydraulic lifting, pneumatic bead-breaking, and rotating table mechanisms. Full detailed prototype developed in SolidWorks showing internal mechanisms, actuators, and drive systems.

SolidWorksMachine DesignHydraulicsPneumatics

P.12

VBA Planetary Gearbox Calculator

Engineering Software · Excel Automation

Full VBA application in Excel to compute planetary gear train parameters: transmission ratio, gear diameters, output speed/torque, and power — with configurable driving/fixed elements and full error validation.

VBAExcelGear DesignAutomation

P.13

Virtual CNC Machine Design

Machine Kinematics & Simulation

Designed and simulated a full 3-axis CNC machine in SolidWorks — machine body, spindle, and linear axis assemblies. Kinematic simulation verified travel ranges, motion sequences, and interference checks.

SolidWorksMachine DesignKinematicsSimulation
